card_buffett.description: The Oracle of Omaha. Buy great companies and hold forever. Keep 25% cash to buy during market panic.

card_cathie.name: Cathie Wood

insights.title: Guru Insights
insights.empty_description: Guru analyses from 10 investment masters update automatically every morning at 7 AM.
insights.disclaimer: This analysis is AI-generated from public data and is not actual investment advice.

dalio.philosophy: All Weather Strategy — A diversified portfolio designed to survive any economic environment. The key is to cover all four scenarios: growth, recession, inflation, and deflation.
dalio.strategy: 30% Stocks + 40% Long Bonds + 15% Medium Bonds + 7.5% Gold + 7.5% Commodities. By mixing assets with low correlation, losses are minimized in any environment.
dalio.key_principle: "Pain + Reflection = Progress" — Learn from losses and establish principles. True success comes from a correct decision-making system.
dalio.track: +9.5% return during the 2008 financial crisis. $150B in assets under management, average 12% annual return over 30 years. The highest total return of any hedge fund in history.

buffett.philosophy: Value Investing — A long-term compounding strategy of buying below intrinsic value and holding for the long term. "If you aren't willing to own a stock for 10 years, don't even think about owning it for 10 minutes."
buffett.strategy: Concentrated investment in quality companies (AAPL, OXY, BRK, etc.). Always maintain 25% cash. The "Circle of Competence" principle of never investing in businesses you don't understand.
buffett.key_principle: "Be fearful when others are greedy, and greedy when others are fearful." Contrarian investing that turns market fear into opportunity.
buffett.track: +19.8% average annual return over the past 58 years. $10,000 invested in 1964 is now worth $140 million. 3x excess return vs. S&P 500.

cathie_wood.philosophy: Disruptive Innovation Investing — Focused on technologies that will change the world in 5 years: AI, blockchain, genomics, space, and more. Short-term volatility is the price of innovation.
cathie_wood.strategy: Concentrated growth stocks (TSLA, COIN, ROKU, PATH, etc.). Minimize diversification; increase position size as conviction grows. Long-term holding principle of 5+ years.
cathie_wood.key_principle: "Innovation doesn't grow linearly, it grows exponentially." Today's expensive stock can become tomorrow's bargain.
cathie_wood.track: ARK Innovation ETF +152% in 2020. Long-term AI optimism, Bitcoin $1.5M price target.

druckenmiller.philosophy: Macro Trends + Concentrated Bets — Read macroeconomic flows and bet big in one direction when conviction is high. "Betting passively on the right judgment is meaningless."
druckenmiller.strategy: Top-down macro: analyze interest rates, currencies, fiscal policy → identify high-probability asymmetric opportunities → leveraged concentrated bets. Cut losses immediately if wrong; add more if right.
druckenmiller.key_principle: "The key is not how often you are right or wrong, but how much you make when you are right." The asymmetry of returns is more important than win rate.
druckenmiller.track: 30 consecutive years of average +30% returns, never a negative year. Over $1B profit from shorting the British pound with Soros in 1992. $12B in assets when Duquesne closed.

help.title: Help
help.faq_a1: baln is an investment education app where you build your own investment principles by reading daily 5-minute market context, participating in predictions, and reviewing outcomes. It is not a trading app.
help.faq_a2: The Context Card helps you understand why your assets moved today through 4-layer analysis (historical context, macro chain, institutional behavior, portfolio impact) in 5 minutes. It auto-updates every 3 hours.
help.faq_q3: How do I participate in the prediction game?
help.faq_a3: Vote YES/NO on 3 daily market prediction questions. Review results and explanations the next day. Earn 3 credits for correct predictions.
help.faq_a4: 1 credit ≈ $0.08. Earn for free via check-in (2C), correct prediction (3C), sharing (5C). Spend in the marketplace for extra AI analysis (1C), Premium trial (5C), etc.
help.faq_q5: How does the AI health checkup work?
help.faq_a5: AI analyzes 7 factors including diversification, volatility, and concentration, rating your portfolio from A+ to F. It also provides a prescription with specific improvement steps.
help.faq_a6: AI analyzes the philosophy of world-class investors like Warren Buffett, Ray Dalio, Cathie Wood, and Stanley Druckenmiller, and provides daily insights applied to today's market.
help.faq_a7: We operate on a Zero-Knowledge principle. We do not collect brokerage passwords or account numbers. All data is encrypted with TLS 1.3 + AES-256.
help.faq_q8: What are the benefits of a Premium subscription?
help.faq_a8: Full 4-layer context card analysis, prediction explanations + review, 3 AI diagnoses/day, institutional behavior analysis, full peer comparison, and 30C monthly bonus. $3.99/month.
help.feedback_desc: You can submit feedback via Settings > Help

privacy.policy_zero_knowledge_desc: We do not collect or store your actual asset holdings, trading passwords, or brokerage login credentials. The app analyzes screenshot images only, and original images are deleted immediately after processing.
privacy.policy_encryption_desc: All data is encrypted in transit using TLS 1.3 and stored with AES-256 encryption. Encryption keys are generated and managed solely on your device.
privacy.policy_local_desc: All calculations and analysis are performed on-device wherever possible. Only anonymized data is sent to our servers when AI analysis is required.
privacy.policy_anon_desc: Data sent for AI analysis has all personally identifiable information removed. Only ticker symbols and quantities are used — no account numbers or real names are ever transmitted.
privacy.policy_delete_desc: You can delete all your data at any time. Go to Settings > Security > Delete Account to permanently erase all data. Deleted data cannot be recovered.
privacy.policy_no_share_desc: Your data is never sold or shared for advertising, marketing, or any other third-party purpose. Even in the event of a legal request, only encrypted data exists, making meaningful disclosure impossible.
privacy.purpose_body:
We process personal data for the following purposes. Data will not be used for any purpose beyond those listed below. If the purpose changes, we will obtain separate consent as required under applicable data protection law (including GDPR and CCPA).

1. Account registration & management: verifying intent to register, identifying and authenticating users, maintaining membership, preventing service misuse
2. Service delivery: portfolio management, AI-powered asset analysis, rebalancing recommendations, context card delivery, prediction game operation
3. Marketing & analytics: providing event information and promotional content (with consent), analyzing usage statistics and access frequency
4. Customer support: verifying the identity of complainants, investigating inquiries, communicating findings, and notifying outcomes
privacy.ai_decision_body:
We perform automated AI analysis (risk assessment, rebalancing suggestions, tax calculations, guru insights, etc.) based on your portfolio data.

Under applicable data protection law (including GDPR Article 22), you have the right to request an explanation of, or to object to, any fully automated decision-making.

• Opt out of AI analysis: Settings > Security > Disable AI Auto-Analysis
• Request an explanation: contact baln.logic@gmail.com

AI analysis never executes investment decisions automatically — all final decisions remain entirely yours.
privacy.cross_border_detail:
■ Data sent to Google Gemini AI:
• Portfolio ticker symbols and weights (e.g., AAPL 30%)
• Market data (prices, exchange rates, indices)
• Health score and risk factors

■ Data never sent:
• Name, email, account numbers, or other personally identifiable information
• Actual holdings amounts or transaction history

■ Safeguards:
• All data is transmitted with TLS 1.3 encryption
• Google Gemini API does not use your data to train its models (Google Cloud API Terms of Service)
• You can withdraw consent for AI data sharing in Settings at any time

All sub-processors hold GDPR compliance certifications and SOC 2 Type II attestation.
privacy.rights_body:
Under applicable data protection law (including GDPR and CCPA), you have the following rights:

1. Right to access your personal data
2. Right to correct or delete your personal data
3. Right to restrict processing
4. Right to object to automated decision-making

How to exercise your rights:
• In-app: Settings > Security > Delete Account (processed immediately)
• Email: privacy@baln.app (within 10 business days)
• Mail: Contact our Data Protection Officer at the address below
privacy.dpo_intro: In accordance with applicable data protection regulations, we have designated a Data Protection Officer (DPO) responsible for overseeing personal data processing and handling data subject complaints and remediation.
privacy.deletion_body: We delete personal data without delay once it is no longer necessary — i.e., once the retention period expires or the processing purpose is fulfilled.
privacy.deletion_procedure_body: Information entered during registration is moved to a separate database after its purpose is fulfilled and retained for the period required by internal policy or applicable law, then permanently deleted. Data in the separate database is not used for any purpose other than those prescribed by law.
privacy.deletion_method_body:
• Electronic files: deleted using technical methods that prevent restoration; database records are destroyed in a non-recoverable manner (logical deletion followed by physical overwrite).
  • Paper documents: shredded or incinerated.
  • AI analysis logs: automatically and permanently deleted 30 days after creation.
  • Backup data: purged from backup copies within 30 days of deleting the original.
privacy.deletion_legal_body:
• Records of contracts or withdrawal of offers: 5 years (applicable e-commerce law)
  • Records of payment and supply of goods/services: 5 years (applicable e-commerce law)
  • Records of consumer complaints or dispute resolution: 3 years (applicable e-commerce law)
  • Communication confirmation records: 12 months (applicable communications privacy law)
  • Login records: 3 months (applicable communications privacy law)
privacy.security_intro: We implement the following technical, administrative, and physical safeguards to protect personal data in accordance with applicable law.
privacy.security_admin_body:
• Establishment and implementation of an internal data management plan
  • Minimizing personnel with access to personal data and providing regular training
  • Periodic internal security audits
privacy.security_tech_body:
• Encryption: all data transmitted via TLS 1.3 and stored with AES-256 encryption
  • Anti-hacking measures: intrusion detection systems, security software installation and updates
  • Access control: management of access privileges to data processing systems and retention of access logs
  • Access log retention and tamper prevention: access logs kept for at least 1 year
privacy.security_physical_body: • As a cloud-based service, physical servers are managed by Supabase Inc. (AWS infrastructure) and meet SOC 2 Type II certification standards.
privacy.auto_collect_intro: We may use technologies that store and retrieve usage information to deliver personalized services.
privacy.auto_collect_items_body:
• App usage statistics (screen views, feature usage frequency)
  • Device information (OS version, app version)
  • Authentication tokens (to maintain login state)
privacy.auto_collect_purpose_body:
• Service usage analysis and improvement
  • Personalized service delivery
  • Maintaining login state
privacy.auto_collect_opt_out_body:
• You can clear app data in your device settings or reinstall the app to reset automatically collected information.
  • Note: opting out of automatic data collection may limit certain features such as staying logged in.
privacy.dispute_line1: If you believe your data protection rights have been violated, you have the right to lodge a complaint with your local data protection authority.
privacy.dispute_line2: EU/EEA users: contact your national data protection supervisory authority (e.g., the Irish DPC at dataprotection.ie).
privacy.dispute_line3: California residents (CCPA): contact the California Privacy Protection Agency at oag.ca.gov/privacy.
privacy.dispute_line4: You may also contact us directly at privacy@baln.app before filing a formal complaint.
privacy.changes_body:
1. This Privacy Policy is effective as of February 21, 2026.

2. Previous versions of this Privacy Policy:
  • This is the initial version; no prior versions exist.

3. If this Privacy Policy is updated, we will notify you via in-app notice at least 7 days before the changes take effect. For material changes affecting your rights, we will provide at least 30 days' notice.
